metadata.title: Project Management | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered project management platform for all your team operations — from task planning and milestones to timesheets, collaboration, and real-time reporting.

hero.title: Modern
hero.description: The AI-powered project management software to plan, track, and deliver faster.

items.title: Spreadsheet view.
items.description: The powerful spreadsheet-like list view keeps every task organized.

items.title: Planner schedule.
items.description: Plan tasks and milestones with a flexible timeline view.

items.title: Flexible flow.
items.description: Calendar, kanban, and task stages keep every team aligned.

collaborationSection.title: Foster
collaborationSection.description: Involve your customers. Decide what parts of your project stakeholders can view and edit. Manage all your communication on one simple interface.

messages.name: Audrey Peterson
messages.text: Can you review the kitchen layout?

messages.name: Joel Willis
messages.text: I added a new document for the client.

timesheetSection.title: Time is money
timesheetSection.description: Timesheets and analytics help you know exactly where the money is going and how your team is spending billable hours.

progressSection.title: Always know where your
progressSection.subtitle: project stands
progressSection.description: Project updates are generated in real-time and give quick access to important statistics, invoices, costs, revenue, and progress.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Create repeatable workflows and project structures.

features.title: Milestones
features.description: Track major project goals that must be reached on time.

features.title: Reporting
features.description: Get project profitability, tasks, workload, and progress.

features.title: Track costs and revenues
features.description: Integrate timesheets, invoicing, purchases, and sales.

planningDemo.title: Project planning
planningDemo.description: Plan tasks, deadlines, resources, and activities from one visual workspace.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon is the backbone of Kick & Rush, fostering collaboration, providing consistency, and adapting to unique requirements.
testimonial.name: Tyrone Miller
